title: Temporal Resonance
description: The device activates. Reality trembles. Everything hangs in the balance.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: The device hums to life. Gears spin faster. The air shimmers and bends.

opening.speaker: Grand Architect
opening.text: Yes! YES! The temporal resonance is building! We will reshape history itself!

opening.speaker: Father
opening.text: *whispers* The failsafe. When I give the signal, activate it.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: Something's wrong. The hum becomes a scream. Cultists look around in confusion and fear.

opening.speaker: Cultist
opening.text: Grand Architect! The readings! The temporal field is destabilizing!

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: He turns to you, eyes furious.

closing.speaker: Veracity
closing.text: I gave you exactly what you asked for. A device that can affect time. Just not in the way you wanted.

closing.speaker: Father
closing.text: The resonance feedback will destroy the device and everything within a hundred meters. We have minutes. Everyone, evacuate!

closing.speaker: Narrator
closing.text: Chaos. Cultists flee. Alarms blare. The Grand Architect stands frozen, staring at his collapsing dream.

closing.speaker: Grand Architect
closing.text: No. NO! This was supposed to save us! To give us back what we lost!

closing.speaker: Veracity
closing.text: Some things can't be changed. Some losses... we have to carry them. But that doesn't mean we stop living.

closing.speaker: Narrator
closing.text: Father grabs your hand. Your companions flank you. You run.

choices.text: Try to save the Grand Architect. Even now, a life is a life.
Focus on escape. He made his choice. We make ours.

puzzle.title: Racing the Collapse
puzzle.instructions: Match your pace to your heartbeat. Don't panic. Keep moving.
